title: Senior Software Engineer - Cyient Capital India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cyient Capital India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Cyient Capital India in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cyient Capital India:
Cyient Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient Capital India!
